days.label: Push Day ? Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 130 ? no logs came in this week, so nothing changed. That's two weeks now where I don't have data on this lift. We stay at 130 until you show me 10/10/10 at RPE 8 or under ? that's the only path to 135. Pause at the chest, drive through the heels, no improvised weight jumps mid-session. Log it.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 40 ? no log, no bump. You had 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 two weeks ago and were one clean session away from earning 45. That session never got logged. Hit 10/10/10 at RPE 7 this week and we move to 45 next week. 30-degree incline, control the negative, full range of motion.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? still waiting on a clean set of logs. Two weeks ago you went 10/9/8 at RPE 7/9/9, which wasn't there yet. Get all 3 sets to 10 reps, RPE 8 or under, and you earn 35. Brace the core, don't lean back, full lockout at the top.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Staying at 10 ? still holding here. The progression this week is the same as last week's ask: 2-second hold at the top of every rep. Slight bend in the elbows, lead with the elbows not the hands, slow and controlled on the way down. No log means no progress ? show me 12/12/12 with the holds.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? no log, no movement. Two weeks ago you were at 10/10/8 at RPE 7/7/8, close but not there. Hit 10/10/10 this week to earn 105. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked tight, full lockout at the top every rep.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? swapping out dips this week (they were new last week and never got logged). Overhead extension hits the long head of the tricep from a stretched position ? a great complement to the close-grip bench you just did. Single dumbbell, both hands, elbows pointed forward, full stretch at the bottom. Start conservatively ? pick a weight you can hit 10-12 at RPE 7-8 and log the exact number.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps ? 5 min

days.label: Pull Day ? Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 195 ? no log this week, so we hold. Two weeks ago you went 8/9/8 at RPE 8/8/8 ? you were close to earning 205 but not there yet. You need all 3 sets in the 9-10 rep range to make the jump. Brace hard off the floor, pull through the heels, controlled descent. Don't rush the setup between reps.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Staying at 50 ? you earned the bump to 50 two weeks ago with a clean 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 at 45. No log came in to confirm how the first week at 50 went, so we hold here and you prove it. Pull to the hip, squeeze at the top for a full second, slow the negative. Each side.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? two weeks ago you hit 10/10/10 at RPE 7/8/8. Top of the range but RPE crept up on sets 2 and 3. Get all 3 sets at RPE 7 to earn 110. Wide grip on the lat bar, pull to upper chest, squeeze the lats at the bottom, no leaning back into a row.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Flye
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? rotating back in reverse flyes after cable face pulls last week (which were never logged). Two weeks ago you debuted these at 15/15/15 at RPE 7/7/7 ? excellent start. Come back at the same weight, hit 12-15 at RPE 7, and log the weight so we have a number to work with next time. Bent over, squeeze the shoulder blades, controlled negative.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 65 ? two weeks ago you went 10/10/9 at RPE 7/8/9. Set 3 fell a rep short and hit RPE 9. Still not clean enough to move to 70. Hit 10/10/10 with RPE at 8 or under across all sets and we make the jump. Strict form, no swinging, full squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? two weeks ago you went 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/8. In range but not at the top, and RPE is right at the ceiling. Need 12/12/12 at RPE 8 or under to earn 35. Neutral grip, control the negative, no momentum. These should be slow and deliberate.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back ? 5 min

days.label: Leg Day ? Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 ? no log this week, so nothing moves. Two weeks ago you went 8/8/8 at RPE 7/7/8 ? solid but stuck at the bottom of the rep range. Push for 9-10 reps across all 3 sets, keep RPE at 8 or under, and we go to 175. Below parallel, brace your core, drive through the heels. Show up and log it.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 145 ? you earned the bump from 135 to 145 two weeks ago with 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7. No log came in to confirm how week one at 145 went, so we hold and you prove it. Slight knee bend, push the hips back, feel the hamstring stretch, bar close to the shins on the way down. Aim for 8-10 at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? two weeks ago you went 10/12/10. Set 2 got to 12 but sets 1 and 3 didn't. Still inconsistent. Get all 3 sets to 12 clean reps per side to earn 35. Rear foot on the bench, drop straight down, drive through the front heel. Don't let the set 2 energy carry and then fall off at the end.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Staying at 65 ? you earned this bump two weeks ago with a perfect 12/12/12 at RPE 7/7/7 at 55. No log confirmed week one at 65, so we hold here. Upper back on the bench, drive through the heels, full hip extension, squeeze the glutes hard at the top and hold for a full second. Log the session.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? rotating back in leg curl after leg extension last week (never logged). Two weeks ago when this debuted you went in at 70 lbs which was way too heavy ? 8/9/6 at RPE 9/9/9. Drop that weight significantly. Try 45-50 lbs. This is an isolation exercise for your hamstrings, not a grind. Hit 12-15 at RPE 7-8, controlled negative, full range of motion. Log the weight you use.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Staying with dead bug ? the ask last week was to hold a 5-10 lb dumbbell behind your head as you extend. No log came in so I don't know if that happened. Same ask this week: grab a light dumbbell (5-10 lb), hold it behind your head as you extend. 3 sec out, 3 sec back, opposite arm and leg. Lower back stays glued to the floor the entire time. Log whether you used the weight or went bodyweight.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors ? 5 min
